taxonomy: Thlasidia integrifolia is classified as a species of butterfly in the family Nymphalidae. It is a member of the subfamily Limenitidinae. Furthermore, it is a part of the tribe Limenitidini and the genus Thlasidia. The classification can be further broken down as follows: Kingdom: Animalia, Phylum: Arthropoda, Class: Insecta, Order: Lepidoptera, Family: Nymphalidae, Subfamily: Limenitidinae, Tribe: Limenitidini, Genus: Thlasidia, Species: T. integrifolia. This classification places Thlasidia integrifolia within the diverse group of butterflies.
